title: WebPuzzle: Benchmarking and Enhancing Information Seeking in Large Language Models via Search Intensity Scaling
task: reinforcement learning for search and reasoning

defines.name: WebPuzzle
defines.definition: A 24k-sample training and 275-sample test benchmark for evaluating information-seeking ability on the live internet across wiki and open-domain queries.

defines.name: DeepDiver
defines.definition: An RL-driven search-and-reasoning framework that learns to interact with real-world search engines and improve information seeking via search intensity scaling.

problem: Existing prompting and supervised fine-tuning methods for information seeking are rigid and are usually evaluated on clean wiki-based benchmarks, which limits adaptability and generalization to noisy real-web environments.
